mainEntity.name: How does pre-existing condition affect slip claim in Centerville Utah?
mainEntity.text: How does pre-existing condition affect slip claim in Centerville Utah?

acceptedAnswer.text: Pre-existing conditions don't bar Utah comp if work slip aggravates them. Must prove substantial contribution.[7]

suggestedAnswer.text: IME doctors apportion. Insurers blame prior issues. Strong medical nexus needed. Aggravation benefits full if proven. Common in older workers knees backs. Expert testimony helps.[7]

name: Pre-Existing Issues in Centerville Slip Claims
description: Pre-existing conditions don't bar Utah comp if work slip aggravates them. Must prove substantial contribution.[7]
